textByHash.847308c6c5d320cc09ab2f729560d59263f8524e: Ah yes, it's about time! We are in the final stages of preparation, there are a few minor adjustments I'd like to make to the barge before we get the crew ready.
textByHash.22d2a6b230814e1b1905c588824d69778f512499: Well, we've learned from our previous attempts that we need a sturdier type of wood to keep the barge afloat.
textByHash.70ceaf5e48fbbbc02a3bcb6cebd420df1ad6d8be: However, magic logs had... well... peculiar side effects.
textByHash.d93a73d6138b3776c0f6c3f47660efdda507c614: Luckily, a new high-grade wood was discovered in distant Western lands, it would make the perfect material for the areas of the barge we need to reinforce.
textByHash.f5763a1f969383ab7466d1b5c8a88e16fa6dc49a: It's not quite that simple, I'm afraid. You'll have to talk to the sawmill operator at the Varrock sawmill to the North West, he will let you know what has to be done.
textByHash.6f5f5aae5580ad7ac5e69874baa0f6fb6d412479: Welcome back. Have you retrieved the supplies yet?
textByHash.11a55f3c542e8fea77efdfb9d0087b7654257e4b: Well we need them to reinforce the barge, the sawmill operator can tell you what you need to do if you're unsure.
textByHash.6085b2d4c8efc6615dfb1cc83bcdd7751283f1a4: The supplies arrived earlier, my men have reinforced the barge using those redwood planks. Thanks for your help.
textByHash.baeb4ffda14bb64d653729fbef9235c473f1dc8e: The barge is prepared for the voyage, so I'm just about done here.
textByHash.68eff798f722236ac9bcea39291d05b25c07f3e1: Now that the barge is ready, you should probably talk to the lead navigator on board.
textByHash.d3c51e9e7a6f4c6ad3aacc0851ac2dbcee3f4bd2: The barge guard will happily help you on board. Just give him a prod!
textByHash.554755c7be9572d8065c90effb615544dc788a59: We're making the final preparations for our voyage to the distant lands to the North.
textByHash.1fdc70861a8305f0bd3e15392aa3bbfc15afbeae: We could do with an extra pair of hands, but you're better off speaking to Curator Haig Halen at the Varrock museum if you'd like to get involved.
